title: Saffron Paella with Shrimp and Chicken
description: A classic Spanish paella dish loaded with succulent shrimp, tender chicken, and a hint of saffron.

ingredients.name: Paella Pan
ingredients.notes: or a large skillet with a heat diffuser

instructions: Heat the paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the chicken and sausage.
Add the saffron, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Increase the heat to high and cook, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
